justifications.completeness: Extraction captures only one of four pedestrians and two of five vehicles, missing the majority of objects and many instance-level annotations.
justifications.semantic_richness: Provides useful per-object attributes (actions, age, motion, doors/trunk) for reported entities but omits many instances and some ground-truth attributes, yielding moderate richness.
justifications.spatial_relations: Gives some plausible relations (pedestrian left of truck, car behind truck, truck next to building) but relations are sparse and absent for most entities.
justifications.overall: Partial correctness and reasonable attribute detail for reported objects are outweighed by poor object recall and incomplete coverage, resulting in a low overall quality.

justifications.completeness: Extraction captures only one of four pedestrians and two of five vehicles, missing most annotated objects.
justifications.semantic_richness: Provides multiple attribute labels (atomic actions, age, motion status, trunk/doors) offering reasonable detail for reported objects but lacks coverage of many instances.
justifications.spatial_relations: Includes plausible relations such as behind and next to, but relations are sparse and absent for the majority of objects.
justifications.overall: Low object coverage substantially limits completeness despite moderate per-object semantic detail and some spatial relations, resulting in an overall limited quality.

justifications.completeness: VLM detected three vehicles but omitted two parked vehicles and both pedestrians from the ground truth, so coverage is poor.
justifications.semantic_richness: The extraction includes useful object attributes (type, motion_status, trunk/doors, spatial_relations) for the detected vehicles but omits pedestrian semantics and several vehicles, yielding moderate richness.
justifications.spatial_relations: Spatial relations provided are reasonable for the reported objects but are sparse and absent for the missed parked vehicles and pedestrians, making them only partially adequate.
justifications.overall: While attributes for detected vehicles are largely reasonable, the significant omissions of two pedestrians and two parked vehicles substantially reduce the overall extraction quality.
